summary: Iteration 27 - Frontend UI Testing for GreenLink Mobile PWA Responsive Experience. ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: Home page with hero section, Navbar with Marketplaces dropdown, Mobile hamburger menu, Marketplace page with 12 products and images, Login flow with admin credentials, User menu dropdown after login, Registration page, Carbon Premium Calculator modal.
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar.jsx: Responsive navbar with hamburger menu (md:hidden) working correctly, data-testid attributes present for mobile-menu-toggle, user-menu-button, etc.
HeroSection.jsx: Responsive text sizes (text-3xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl) and button layout (flex-col sm:flex-row) properly implemented
Marketplace.jsx: Responsive grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4) showing 12 products with images from demo seeding
CTASection.jsx: Responsive button layout (grid-cols-2 sm:flex) with 4 user type buttons working
FeaturesSection.jsx: Responsive grid for feature cards working correctly
seed_data_creation: 12 demo products already seeded from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified all frontend UI features for mobile PWA optimization: 1) Home page renders with hero, features, cultures, CTA sections, 2) Navbar desktop dropdown with 3 marketplace links works, 3) Mobile hamburger menu opens with marketplace links and auth buttons, 4) Marketplace page shows 12 products with images and filtering, 5) Login with admin redirects to /admin/dashboard, 6) User menu dropdown shows Tableau de bord, Mon profil, Déconnexion, 7) Registration page shows 6 user type cards, 8) Carbon Calculator modal opens with form fields. PWA service worker registered correctly.

features_verified.Home page loads at /: PASS - Hero section with 'Primes Carbone pour l'Agriculture Durable' title, Calculer ma prime button, S'inscrire button
features_verified.Navbar desktop elements: PASS - GreenLink logo, Marketplaces dropdown, Services link, Se connecter/S'inscrire buttons visible
features_verified.Marketplaces dropdown: PASS - Shows 3 links: Bourse des Récoltes (NOUVEAU), Marketplace Intrants, Marché Carbone (RSE)
features_verified.Marketplace page /supplier/marketplace: PASS - 12 produit(s) disponible(s), search input, category filter, product cards with images, XOF prices, supplier names
features_verified.Login page /login: PASS - Email/Phone input, password input, Se connecter button, S'inscrire link
features_verified.Admin login flow: PASS - Login with klenakan.eric@gmail.com redirects to /admin/dashboard, shows admin stats (47 users, 12 products, 9 cooperatives)
features_verified.User menu dropdown: PASS - After login shows user avatar with name, Tableau de bord, Mon profil, Déconnexion items
features_verified.Registration page /register: PASS - 6 user type cards (Producteur, Acheteur, Agent Terrain, Entreprise RSE, Fournisseur, Coopérative), Nom complet, Phone/Email toggle, Password inputs
features_verified.Carbon Premium Calculator: PASS - Modal opens with Surface hectares selector, Nombre d'arbres input, Type de culture buttons (Cacao/Anacarde/Café), Continuer button
features_verified.Mobile hamburger menu: PASS - data-testid='mobile-menu-toggle' works, opens slide-in menu with Marketplaces section, Infos/Services, auth buttons

mocked_api_note: Orange Money payment and USSD integration remain MOCKED as per original design
